value.title: Tavily API
value.content: ![Image 4: WRITER](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/a6aa3b4863c0bf12915aa7b3b545e2d35ae1b371-111x36.svg?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 5: MongoDB](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/16ff2c3504d94e5df8c89eb17c3db0734d67d98a-139x35.svg?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 6: GROQ](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/b0b62d4d994f6474729aa04f03cc6adb952a02f9-96x35.svg?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 7: LangChain](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/17a41ff0375408b9c2f90335f342fc3a694bd8a6-3000x554.png?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 8: Monday](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/fbfe747f3d3d8e4ab219b92ec04fd7f385a7f0a8-194x35.svg?h=70&q=75&auto=format). [![Image 9: JetBrains](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/a2c41b1b27ac117e4e42327eb64ff35b42d240ae-164x35.svg?h=70&q=75&auto=format)Case Study](https://www.tavily.com/blog/jetbrains-coding-agent-junie). ![Image 10: AWS](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/9177596d793b26d549174af03474d5baf630ea01-59x35.svg?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 11: Mastercard](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/8820e6a5c2de2d4c3bfab35d2c75731be207348b-3840x790.png?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 12: Ironclad](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/5d0f82653aecbc78852d0ff5d59a46e8c3c37fa6-186x35.svg?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 13: IBM](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/1198f02ebfa2ea912b7fb62ba1502cf312a4f96b-95x35.svg?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 14: BCG](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/33d79d4f5d086bc319dc56ec062d521fee870f32-1024x432.svg?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 16: Extend](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/09cf2dc9be4ca8a21232a08ccdfc86b4dfa2f049-1500x653.png?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 17: WRITER](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/a6aa3b4863c0bf12915aa7b3b545e2d35ae1b371-111x36.svg?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 18: MongoDB](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/16ff2c3504d94e5df8c89eb17c3db0734d67d98a-139x35.svg?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 19: GROQ](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/b0b62d4d994f6474729aa04f03cc6adb952a02f9-96x35.svg?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 20: LangChain](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/17a41ff0375408b9c2f90335f342fc3a694bd8a6-3000x554.png?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 21: Monday](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/fbfe747f3d3d8e4ab219b92ec04fd7f385a7f0a8-194x35.svg?h=70&q=75&auto=format). [![Image 22: JetBrains](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/a2c41b1b27ac117e4e42327eb64ff35b42d240ae-164x35.svg?h=70&q=75&auto=format)Case Study](https://www.tavily.com/blog/jetbrains-coding-agent-junie). ![Image 23: AWS](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/9177596d793b26d549174af03474d5baf630ea01-59x35.svg?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 24: Mastercard](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/8820e6a5c2de2d4c3bfab35d2c75731be207348b-3840x790.png?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 25: Ironclad](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/5d0f82653aecbc78852d0ff5d59a46e8c3c37fa6-186x35.svg?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 26: IBM](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/1198f02ebfa2ea912b7fb62ba1502cf312a4f96b-95x35.svg?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 27: BCG](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/33d79d4f5d086bc319dc56ec062d521fee870f32-1024x432.svg?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 29: Extend](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/09cf2dc9be4ca8a21232a08ccdfc86b4dfa2f049-1500x653.png?h=70&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 30: Ground models with fresh web context](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/830c0f3bf82e41c4521abd7fa0357c26330c0d6d-2006x1844.png?rect=81,0,1844,1844&w=60&h=60&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 31: Handle thousands of web queries in seconds](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/da9054cf32d9699107bbc60fbf492bd7d6e2901c-2100x1838.png?rect=131,0,1838,1838&w=60&h=60&q=75&auto=format). ![Image 32: Ship to production with built-in safeguards](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/5tlb0lxv/production/58114a8d3b4ac8a2323714f65645271dc883c385-1553x1569.png?rect=0,9,1553,1553&w=60&h=60&q=75&auto=format). [![Image 33: Databricks Partners with Tavily on MCP Marketplace](https://tavily.com/_next/image?url=%2Fspotlight-placeholders%2Fdatabricks-red.png&w=3840&q=75)](https://www.databricks.com/blog/accelerate-ai-development-databricks-discover-govern-and-build-mcp-and-agent-bricks)[![Image 34: IBM Partners with Tavily on WatsonX Platform](https://tavily.com/spotlight-placeholders/ibm.svg)](https://www.ibm.com/new/announcements/driving-smarter-data-enrichment-ibm-and-tavily-partner-for-agentic-ai-solutions)[![Image 35: JetBrains Integrates Tavily for Real-Time AI Search](https://tavily.com/_next/image?url=%2Fspotlight-placeholders%2FJetBrains.png&w=3840&q=75)](https://www.tavily.com/blog/jetbrains-tavily)[![Image 36: Tavily releases /research endpoint, achieves state-of-the-art](https://tavily.com/_next/image?url=%2Fspotlight-placeholders%2Fresearch.png&w=3840&q=75)](https://chat-research.tavily.com/)[![Image 37: Tavily raises $25M Series A Funding](https://tavily.com/_next/image?url=%2Fspotlight-placeholders%2FSeries%20A.png&w=3840&q=75)](https://techcrunch.com/2025/08/06/tavily-raises-25m-to-connect-ai-agents-to-the-web/). value.title: Frequently Asked Questions - Tavily Docs
value.content: [Skip to main content](https://docs.tavily.com/faq/faq#content-area). *   [Get an API key](https://app.tavily.com/). *   [Get an API key](https://app.tavily.com/). *   [API Playground](https://app.tavily.com/playground). *   [About](https://docs.tavily.com/documentation/about). *   [Quickstart](https://docs.tavily.com/documentation/quickstart). *   [Credits & Pricing](https://docs.tavily.com/documentation/api-credits). *   [Rate Limits](https://docs.tavily.com/documentation/rate-limits). *   [Frequently Asked Questions](https://docs.tavily.com/faq/faq). *   [Features & Benefits](https://docs.tavily.com/faq/faq#features-%26-benefits). *   [Pricing & Plans](https://docs.tavily.com/faq/faq#pricing-%26-plans). *   [Integration & Usage](https://docs.tavily.com/faq/faq#integration-%26-usage). *   [Support & Privacy](https://docs.tavily.com/faq/faq#support-%26-privacy). *   [Getting Started](https://docs.tavily.com/faq/faq#getting-started). **Traditional Search APIs:** Unlike Bing, Google, or SerpAPI, Tavily dynamically searches the web, reviews multiple sources, and extracts the most relevant content, delivering concise, ready-to-use information optimized for AI applications.**AI Answer Engine APIs:** Unlike Perplexity Sonar API or OpenAI Web Search API, Tavily focuses on delivering high-quality, customizable search results. #### [​](https://docs.tavily.com/faq/faq#features-&-benefits). #### [​](https://docs.tavily.com/faq/faq#pricing-&-plans). #### [​](https://docs.tavily.com/faq/faq#integration-&-usage). The API is simple to set up—just sign up, [get your API key](https://app.tavily.com/home), and integrate it within minutes. Visit our [SDKs](https://docs.tavily.com/sdk) and [API Reference](https://docs.tavily.com/documentation/api-reference/introduction) for more guidance and information. #### [​](https://docs.tavily.com/faq/faq#support-&-privacy). #### [​](https://docs.tavily.com/faq/faq#getting-started). 2.   [Get your API key](https://app.tavily.com/home). value.title: Pricing - Tavily Help Center
value.content: At Tavily, we offer flexible pricing plans to suit different users, from individual researchers to growing teams and enterprises. Whether you need a free plan to get started or a scalable solution to support your business, we have the right plan for you. * **Who is it for?** New creators and individuals exploring Tavily. * **Who is it for?** Enthusiasts who require more API usage. * **Who is it for?** Small teams that need a scalable search solution. ## **Pay-As-You-Go Plan**. * **Who is it for?** Users who prefer a flexible, usage-based model. If you're just getting started, the **Researcher (Free) plan** is perfect for exploring Tavily’s capabilities. If you require more frequent API usage, the **Project, Bootstrap, Startup, or Growth plans** offer increasing levels of resources. Businesses and teams needing flexibility may prefer the **Pay-As-You-Go** model, while enterprises can work with us to build a **custom solution** that fits their needs. How to Set a Limit for Pay as You Go Option?

value.title: Perplexity Search API vs. Tavily: RAG & Agent Choice 2025
value.content: Tavily: The Better Choice for RAG and Agents in 2025](https://alphacorp.ai/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcms.alphacorp.ai%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2F2025%2F09%2Ftwo-robots-fighting.webp&w=3840&q=75). The Perplexity Search API excels at ultra-low-latency filtered searches priced at $5 per 1,000 requests, while Tavily returns structured, LLM-ready content with integrated extraction at predictable credit costs starting with 1,000 free monthly credits. The[Search API returns ranked](https://docs.perplexity.ai/getting-started/pricing)web results with metadata in under 400 milliseconds at the median, optimized for agent loops that make frequent, narrow queries. Perplexity charges a flat[$5.00 per 1,000 requests](https://docs.perplexity.ai/getting-started/pricing)for its Search API with no token-based pricing, making the math simple for agent systems that issue many lightweight queries. You could use Perplexity’s Search API in the agent loop for real-time queries that need filtering and speed, feeding results into your orchestration layer built with[LangGraph or similar frameworks](https://langchain-ai.github.io/langgraph/tutorials/rag/langgraph_agentic_rag/). If you need expert guidance on architecting RAG systems, evaluating retrieval providers, or building compliant AI workflows, our [team](https://alphacorp.ai/) can help you navigate these tradeoffs and accelerate your path to production. Share[](https://x.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Falphacorp.ai%2Fblog%2Fperplexity-search-api-vs-tavily-the-better-choice-for-rag-and-agents-in-2025&text=Perplexity%20Search%20API%20vs.%20Tavily%3A%20The%20Better%20Choice%20for%20RAG%20and%20Agents%20in%202025)[](https://www.linkedin.com/sharing/share-offsite/?url=https%3A%2F%2Falphacorp.ai%2Fblog%2Fperplexity-search-api-vs-tavily-the-better-choice-for-rag-and-agents-in-2025)[](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Falphacorp.ai%2Fblog%2Fperplexity-search-api-vs-tavily-the-better-choice-for-rag-and-agents-in-2025). *   [info [at] alphacorp.ai](https://alphacorp.ai/blog/perplexity-search-api-vs-tavily-the-better-choice-for-rag-and-agents-in-2025#contact). [Audio 1](https://alphacorp.ai/blog/perplexity-search-api-vs-tavily-the-better-choice-for-rag-and-agents-in-2025).
